# `modules/woz_uwb/src/facade/woz_uwb_facade.h`

Public header for UWB facade: exposes Aliro DS-TWR responder lifecycle and range query; the CCC engine is bound and unbound via internal ursk and stop calls.

**used by** [`modules/woz_uwb/src/ccc/cherry_ccc_shim.c`](../modules.woz_uwb.src.ccc/cherry_ccc_shim.c.md), [`modules/woz_uwb/src/driver/uwb_selftest.c`](../modules.woz_uwb.src.driver/uwb_selftest.c.md), [`modules/woz_uwb/src/facade/woz_uwb_facade.c`](woz_uwb_facade.c.md)

## API

### `int woz_uwb_start_aliro(const struct woz_uwb_aliro_cfg *cfg)`
`modules/woz_uwb/src/facade/woz_uwb_facade.h:36`

Start the CCC DS-TWR responder bound to a live Aliro credential; returns 0 on success.
